metadata.subject: Arts Education
metadata.description: Students participate as members of a working dance company or ensemble, developing collaborative skills and performance experience. This course emphasizes ensemble work, choreographic interpretation, and professional dance practices.
metadata.general_description: A course focused on collaborative dance practices through participation in an organized dance ensemble.

big_ideas.statement: Dance companies operate as collaborative ensembles where individual artistry contributes to collective artistic goals.
big_ideas.elaboration: Members work together to interpret choreography, create cohesive performances, and develop ensemble cohesion and unity of vision.

big_ideas.statement: Professional dance practices include rehearsal protocols, performance standards, and collaborative communication.
big_ideas.elaboration: Working as part of a dance company requires discipline, commitment, clear communication, and adherence to professional standards and expectations.

big_ideas.statement: Ensemble work develops individual dancers while creating unified artistic expression.
big_ideas.elaboration: Participating in a company setting strengthens technical and artistic skills while teaching dancers to serve the collective vision of the ensemble.

big_ideas.statement: Dance companies create community and cultural expression through performance and artistic sharing.
big_ideas.elaboration: Companies serve as vehicles for cultural transmission, community engagement, and the creation of meaningful shared artistic experiences.

competencies.raw: Develop technical and artistic skills through company rehearsals and training
i_can_statements: I can execute technical skills with consistency and precision as required by company choreography
I can interpret choreographic material with artistic expression and individual presence
I can explore movement possibilities while maintaining fidelity to choreographed work
I can continuously develop my technical abilities through disciplined rehearsal practice

competencies.raw: Create and explore movement within ensemble contexts
i_can_statements: I can contribute creative ideas during ensemble building and workshop processes
I can participate in collaborative choreography development and improvisation
I can adapt my movement to synchronize with ensemble members
I can explore movement in relation to other dancers' spatial and temporal proximity

competencies.raw: Develop various performance roles and responsibilities
i_can_statements: I can execute different choreographic roles with appropriate focus and energy
I can perform in various formations and ensemble configurations
I can take on leadership roles such as demonstrating or assisting with choreography
I can adapt my performance approach for different choreographic styles and company works

competencies.raw: Build ensemble presence and group cohesion
i_can_statements: I can develop awareness of other ensemble members while performing
I can create unified ensemble lines and synchronized movement
I can balance individual expression with collective artistic vision
I can contribute to ensemble cohesion and positive ensemble culture

competencies.raw: Analyze choreographic works and interpret artistic intent
i_can_statements: I can identify the themes and artistic intent of company choreography
I can explain how specific movement choices contribute to overall artistic vision
I can understand the choreographer's perspective and creative choices
I can analyze how ensemble interpretation affects audience reception

competencies.raw: Reflect on personal performance and ensemble contribution
i_can_statements: I can assess my technical and artistic performance contributions
I can identify personal strengths and areas for development as an ensemble member
I can evaluate how my choices affect ensemble cohesion and performance quality
I can set goals for improving both technical skills and ensemble collaboration

competencies.raw: Understand dance company structures and professional dance practices
i_can_statements: I can explain the organizational structure and operations of dance companies
I can understand the roles and responsibilities of different company members
I can recognize professional standards for rehearsal, performance, and conduct
I can appreciate the business and logistical aspects of running a dance company

competencies.raw: Connect ensemble work to broader artistic and cultural contexts
i_can_statements: I can research the cultural and historical contexts of company repertoire
I can understand how dance companies contribute to cultural preservation and innovation
I can reflect on my role in creating meaningful artistic experiences
I can analyze how dance companies address social or cultural themes

competencies.raw: Communicate effectively within ensemble rehearsal and performance settings
i_can_statements: I can understand and respond to choreographer directions and feedback
I can ask clarifying questions and seek feedback to improve performance
I can provide constructive feedback to ensemble peers
I can communicate my needs and concerns respectfully within the ensemble
I can learn and retain choreography through observation and repetition
I can document choreographic material through personal notation or video
I can teach learned choreography to other ensemble members when needed
I can maintain accuracy of choreography across multiple rehearsals and performances

competencies.raw: Engage with audiences and represent the company
i_can_statements: I can perform with focus and presence for audiences
I can represent the company professionally in performance and public contexts
I can discuss the company's work and artistic mission with audiences
I can use performance as communication of artistic vision and meaning

competencies.raw: Participate in company communication and community engagement
i_can_statements: I can contribute to company discussions and decision-making processes
I can participate in community engagement and outreach activities
I can assist with documentation of company activities and performances
I can share company information and engage with diverse audiences

competencies.raw: Connect ensemble work to diverse dance traditions and contemporary practices
i_can_statements: I can learn and perform choreography from various dance styles and cultural traditions
I can appreciate diverse choreographic approaches and artistic perspectives
I can explore how different traditions inform contemporary dance practices
I can respectfully engage with culturally specific choreography

competencies.raw: Expand artistic range through company repertoire and training
i_can_statements: I can develop versatility as a performer across different choreographic styles
I can participate in ongoing training to expand my technical and artistic abilities
I can challenge myself with new movement vocabularies and performance demands
I can grow as an artist through engagement with diverse company works

competencies.raw: Explore career development and professional opportunities in dance
i_can_statements: I can understand pathways for continued development as a professional dancer
I can explore diverse career opportunities in dance and related fields
I can network with other dancers, choreographers, and arts professionals
I can develop a personal plan for artistic and professional growth

competencies.raw: Build connections between dance company work and community
i_can_statements: I can understand the company's role in serving and building community
I can participate in outreach and educational activities
I can connect audience members to the artistic vision and cultural significance of company work
I can contribute to making dance accessible and meaningful to diverse audiences

areas.name: Ensemble Rehearsal Practices
topics: Feedback and communication in rehearsal settings

areas.name: Performance and Presentation
topics: Costume, lighting, and production design considerations
Video recording and documentation of performances

areas.name: Dance Company Organization and Culture
topics: Diversity, equity, and inclusion in dance companies

areas.name: Artistic Development and Growth
topics: Reflection on artistic identity and growth
